title: theworstaistudioever
description: An applied AI studio shipping venture-grade products for underserved, over-instrumented markets. New portfolio company daily.

items.title: Binance for born-again minimalists
items.summary: An exchange for liquidating everything you own. List your possessions, watch the order book, and ride your net worth down to a clean zero.
items.content_text: An exchange for liquidating everything you own. List your possessions, watch the order book, and ride your net worth down to a clean zero.

items.title: LangChain for plant parents
items.summary: The open-source framework for composable houseplant care. Define watering chains, give every plant vector memory, and trace every leaf in production.
items.content_text: The open-source framework for composable houseplant care. Define watering chains, give every plant vector memory, and trace every leaf in production.

items.title: Twilio for capybaras
items.summary: Programmable messaging that arrives whenever it arrives.
items.content_text: Programmable messaging that arrives whenever it arrives.

items.title: YouTube for foxes
items.summary: A video platform for foxes. Upload bin footage, get sorted by scream, and earn money you are structurally unable to collect.
items.content_text: A video platform for foxes. Upload bin footage, get sorted by scream, and earn money you are structurally unable to collect.

items.title: Nuro for vegans
items.summary: Driverless electric pods that carry your groceries at four miles per hour and refuse, on principle, to touch anything with a face.

items.title: Replicate for plant parents
items.summary: Production-grade machine learning inference for the seventeen plants on your windowsill.

items.title: Anduril for marathon runners
items.summary: Autonomous perimeter surveillance, real-time contact classification, and quadcopter overwatch for the recreational 10K.

items.title: Quora for left-handed people
items.summary: The question-and-answer network where only left-handed people are allowed to answer.
items.content_text: The question-and-answer network where only left-handed people are allowed to answer.

items.title: Lucid for feral cats
items.summary: A six-figure autonomous electric vehicle for an animal that has never once asked to go anywhere.

items.title: Kraken for failed novelists
items.summary: The regulated exchange for manuscripts that will never be read.
items.content_text: The regulated exchange for manuscripts that will never be read.

items.title: Notion for red pandas
items.summary: The connected workspace for wikis, bamboo logistics, and sleep, built for a solitary mammal who never asked for project management.

items.title: Spotify for night owls
items.summary: The streaming service that refuses to play during the day.

items.title: Box for octopuses
items.summary: The Containment Cloud for octopuses. Every enclosure versioned, every arm permissioned, every escape on the record.

items.title: Notion for mid-afternoon despair
items.summary: The all-in-one workspace for mid-afternoon despair. Capture it as a block, sort it into a database, roll it up into a trend.

items.title: Palantir for dogs
items.summary: Operational intelligence for the modern multi-dog household.
